'''Whelmo Darb''' was a dark-skinned [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] in the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]].

==Biography==
Darb served aboard the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyer]] [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']], which was the flagship of [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]. He escorted [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to the [[Situation Room/Legends|Situation Room]] to meet with [[Tenel Ka Djo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
